test.name: TC-PERF-03

kw.name: Get Account By ID Response Time
Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Login User
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=bankApi, url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank, headers={'Accept': 'application/json'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/login/john/demo path_url=/parabank/services/bank/login/john/demo headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
Verify login via REST API

kw.name: Valid Accounts Retrieval
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=bankApi, url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank, headers={'Accept': 'application/json'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/customers/12212/accounts path_url=/parabank/services/bank/customers/12212/accounts headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

GET Response : url=https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/services/bank/customers/12212/accounts status=200, reason=OK headers={'Date': 'Sat, 20 Jun 2026 07:29:15 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'cf-cache-status': 'DYNAMIC', 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff', 'Content-Encoding': 'gzip', 'CF-RAY': 'a0e90fb539152247-BOM'} body=[{"id":13344,"customerId":12212,"type":"CHECKING","balance":4122.93},{"id":13899,"customerId":12212,"type":"SAVINGS","balance":100.00},{"id":14121,"customerId":12212,"type":"SAVINGS","balance":200.00},{"id":14676,"customerId":12212,"type":"SAVINGS","balance":100.00},{"id":15342,"customerId":12212,"type":"SAVINGS","balance":100.00},{"id":15675,"customerId":12212,"type":"CHECKING","balance":100.00},{"id":19005,"customerId":12212,"type":"CHECKING","balance":100.00},{"id":19116,"customerId":12212,"type":"CHECKING","balance":100.00},{"id":19227,"customerId":12212,"type":"CHECKING","balance":100.00}]
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

Verify login + accounts + account details completes within 5 seconds

test.doc: Verify login + accounts + account details completes within 5 seconds
